commands.review_summary:
The PR adds Job evidence fields, a provider-neutral delegated single-file download capability, Islo bounded `--require-artifact`/`--download` retrieval, docs, and focused tests.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a feature PR rather than a reproduced bug report. The relevant verification is an exact-head Islo run that proves the new required-artifact/download path after the command succeeds.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] No automated repair is appropriate; the blocker is contributor-provided exact-head live proof plus maintainer approval of the narrowed public capability surface.

target.title: feat(run): add bounded delegated evidence retrieval
target.body:
## Summary

- add generic Job fields for labels, artifact globs, required artifacts, and downloads
- add a provider-neutral bounded single-file delegated download capability, implemented first by Islo
- harden Islo retrieval against protected paths, symlink escape, privilege mismatch, profile output, hostile files, unbounded reads, and archive-chunk secret leakage

This extracts the reusable execution/evidence pieces from https://github.com/openclaw/crabbox/pull/235 without adding a `crabbox data` namespace, manifest schema, Worker storage contract, provider data-policy API, or product-specific examples.

Resolves https://github.com/openclaw/crabbox/issues/225.

## Security And Configuration

- delegated remote paths must be normalized safe relative single-file paths
- `.git` and `.crabbox` components, globs, URLs, absolute paths, and traversal are rejected
- Islo reads run as the same workload user as the command, remain inside the canonical workspace, use profile-free Bash, and are capped at 64 KiB
- remote reads have a 15-second process deadline and 20-second client deadline
- no new secrets or persistent configuration are introduced

## Verification

- `go vet ./...`
- `go test -race ./internal/providers/islo`
- focused CLI tests for Job forwarding, delegated capability gating/path validation, and Islo CLI materialization
- `scripts/check-docs.sh`
- `node --test scripts/*.test.js` (218 passed)
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local` (clean after accepted findings were fixed)

## Live Islo Proof

The bounded Islo required-artifact/download mechanism has successful live proof on https://github.com/openclaw/crabbox/pull/235 from contributor head `eafef3a`.

Fresh exact-head runs from `2c96803f351117d6b7e7d5090980413ea70d3efe` were attempted three times with disposable API keys. All three reached Islo but timed out waiting for sandbox-create response headers before command execution. Each key was revoked, and `islo ls --output json` confirmed no orphaned Crabbox sandboxes. This is an external provider availability blocker, not a passing exact-head live run.

## Credit

The generic capability and initial live proof were extracted from work by @zozo123 in https://github.com/openclaw/crabbox/pull/235. The commit preserves co-author credit and the changelog thanks the contributor.
target.author: steipete
